originalTitle: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre
title: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre
content: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.

originalTitle: Twins marry twins in joyous Nigerian joint wedding
title: Double the Love, Double the Fun! Twin Wedding in Nigeria!
content:
Hello, Amazing Twins!

Hi everyone! Your friendly African news reporter is here with a super happy story! Guess what happened in Nigeria? It was a day filled with double the smiles and double the fun! It was a very special wedding day. Not just one wedding, but two! And guess what else? It was a wedding for twins marrying twins! Can you believe it? That's four wonderful people getting married on the very same day. It's like magic! This amazing story comes from our beautiful continent, Africa, where celebrations are always big and joyful. Everyone was so excited to see something so unique and special happen.

Meet Taiwo and Kehinde!

Let's meet two very important boys, well, now men! Their names are Taiwo and Kehinde. They are brothers, and they are identical twins! That means they look very much alike. Sometimes it's hard to tell them apart, even for their parents! Taiwo was born first, and Kehinde was born just a little bit after him. In Nigeria, especially where they come from (the Yoruba people), these names are very special for twins. Taiwo means "the first to taste the world," and Kehinde means "the one who comes after." Isn't that a cool fact? These two brothers grew up together, playing together, going to school together. They shared everything! They had a special bond, like many twins do. They often knew what the other was thinking without even saying a word. They were best friends from the very beginning. They always had each other, no matter what.

And Their Twin Sweethearts!

Now, Taiwo and Kehinde didn't just meet any girls. Oh no! They met very special girls too. They met twin sisters! Yes, twin sisters! Let's call them Mary and Martha for our story. Mary and Martha are also identical twins, just like Taiwo and Kehinde. They also grew up together, sharing secrets and playing games. They understood each other perfectly, just like the twin brothers did. Imagine that! Two sets of twins! Taiwo met Mary, and Kehinde met Martha. It was like fate, like it was meant to be. They started talking, laughing, and spending time together. They found out they had so much in common. They liked similar things and enjoyed each other's company. And guess what? Each brother fell in love with one of the twin sisters! Taiwo fell in love with Mary, and Kehinde fell in love with Martha. It was a double love story, with twice the happiness! Their hearts found their matches, and they were all so happy.

A Special Day for Four!

Then came the most exciting news! Taiwo and Kehinde decided they wanted to marry Mary and Martha. And they wanted to do it on the same day! What a fantastic idea! The wedding day was so beautiful and bright. Everyone was so happy. Imagine seeing two grooms who look alike, standing next to two brides who also look alike! It was a sight to behold. It was like seeing double happiness everywhere you looked. The air was buzzing with excitement and joy. The wedding took place in Nigeria, a country in Africa that loves big celebrations. There was lots of music, dancing, and yummy food. The brides wore beautiful, colourful dresses, and the grooms looked very smart in their special clothes. Their families and friends came from all over to celebrate with them. There were so many smiles and happy cheers. It was a day full of joy, which means everyone was super, super happy! They all said "yes" to forever love!

Why is This So Cool?

This wedding is super cool because it's not every day you see twins marry twins! It's very, very unique, which means it's one of a kind. It shows how special the bond between twins can be. Taiwo and Kehinde always had each other, and now they both have a twin wife too! It's like their families are going to be full of twin magic. Imagine that! Two sets of identical twins making one big happy family. It's a wonderful story of love and connection. It reminds us that sometimes, love comes in amazing, unexpected ways. This kind of wedding is very rare and makes everyone smile. It's a true fairy tale for these four wonderful people. They found their perfect match, and their perfect matches happened to be twins too!

Did You Know? Fun Twin Facts!

Hey kids, let's learn some fun facts about twins! * **Did you know?** There are two kinds of twins! "Identical twins" (like Taiwo, Kehinde, Mary, and Martha) look exactly alike because they come from one egg that splits. "Fraternal twins" (or non-identical twins) are like regular brothers and sisters born at the same time; they don't look exactly alike because they come from two separate eggs. * **Did you know?** Nigeria has more twins than almost any other country in the world! It's sometimes called the "Twin Capital of the World." How cool is that for our continent, Africa? This might be why stories like Taiwo and Kehinde's are extra special here. Many families in Nigeria are blessed with twins. * **Did you know?** Many twins have their own special language when they are babies! It's called "cryptophasia." They babble and understand each other even before they learn to speak regular words. It's like their own secret code! * **Did you know?** Sometimes twins can feel what the other is feeling! If one twin gets hurt, the other might feel a little pain too, even if they are far apart. It's like they have a super special connection that nobody else can truly understand!

Happily Ever After, Double!

So, Taiwo and Kehinde, and their twin wives Mary and Martha, are now starting their new lives together. They will have double the fun, double the support, and double the love. They will build their homes and make new memories. Their story reminds us that love can be found in the most amazing places, and sometimes, it comes in pairs! We wish them all the happiness in the world. What a wonderful story from our beautiful continent, Africa! Hip hip hooray for the twin couples!
summary: Four twins in Nigeria, two brothers named Taiwo and Kehinde and two sisters named Mary and Martha, celebrated a very special wedding day by getting married to each other.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows how unique and beautiful love can be, and it highlights the special bond between twins, bringing double the joy to their families and friends.

originalTitle: Former Kenyan justice minister blocked from entering Uganda, lawyers' body says
title: Former Kenyan justice minister blocked from entering Uganda, lawyers' body says
content: Martha  Karua is a lawyer representing detained Ugandan opposition leader Kizza Besigye who is on trial for treason.

originalTitle: Thousands of kites soar over Denmark at annual beach festival
title: Awesome Kites Soar High in Faraway Denmark!
content:
Hello, super friends! Guess what amazing news I have for you today? Far, far away, in a land called Denmark, something truly magical happened. The sky was filled with so much colour! It was like a giant painting in the air, but moving! Thousands and thousands of kites flew high, high up in the sky. Can you imagine that?

A Sky Full of Colour!

What is a kite? Imagine a toy that loves to dance in the sky! Kites are usually made from light paper or special fabric. They have a frame of thin sticks to keep their shape. And they always have a long, strong string that you hold very carefully. This string is very important! When the wind blows, it pushes the kite up, up, up! It's like the wind gives the kite a big hug and lifts it high into the air. People from all over the world love to fly kites. It's a super fun way to play with the wind and see amazing things! At this amazing festival in Denmark, the sky was packed with joy! There were kites shaped like big colourful fish swimming in the air. Some looked like giant friendly dragons with long tails. Others were shaped like funny octopuses with many waving arms. And many, many were just big, beautiful squares and diamonds, painted with all the colours you can imagine! Red, blue, yellow, green – all dancing together in the sun. Did you know? Kites have been around for a very, very long time! People first started flying kites thousands of years ago in countries like China. They used them for fun, and sometimes even to send messages across distances!

Where Did This Happen? Faraway Denmark!

This wonderful kite party happened in a country called Denmark. It's very far from our beautiful continent of Africa. You would need to travel for a long, long time in an airplane to get there! It's across big oceans. Denmark is a country in Europe. It has many green fields and also beautiful beaches. This special kite festival takes place on a small island named Fano. Fano Island is a lovely place right next to the big, big sea, called the North Sea. Imagine a very wide, sandy beach, perfect for running and playing. Now imagine that beach with the wind blowing just right, not too strong and not too gentle. That's the perfect place for kites to take off and fly! Just like some of our amazing beaches here in Africa, but with many, many kites filling the air!

So Many Kites! Can You Imagine 25,000?

Now, listen to this number, my friends: roughly 25,000 kites! That's twenty-five thousand! Can you even picture that? It's a huge, huge number! Think of it like this: if your school has 100 students, imagine 250 schools worth of kites all flying at once! It was like the sky itself was wearing a party dress made of kites. Small kites, medium kites, big kites, and even super-duper enormous kites! Some kites were so big, they needed several strong people to help launch them into the air. They were like giant flying works of art, floating gently above everyone's heads! Each kite was special in its own way. Some had long, flowing tails that swirled and danced behind them like ribbons. Others had bright, shiny patterns that glittered and sparkled in the sun. It was a truly unforgettable sight, like a dream come true for anyone who loves colours and things that fly!

Why Do People Fly Kites? It's Pure Fun!

Why do people love flying kites so much? Well, for many reasons! First, it's incredibly fun and exciting to watch your kite go higher and higher. You feel like you're playing catch with the sky and talking to the wind! It's also a wonderful way to spend time outdoors. You get to feel the fresh air on your face and see the wide open sky above you. And when many people fly kites together, like at this festival, it becomes a big, happy celebration for everyone! People from all over the world, from different countries and cultures, came to Fano Island. They shared their beautiful kites and their special love for flying. It’s like a big family reunion for kite lovers! Everyone smiles, laughs, and points to the sky, sharing their joy. It's a time for friendship and wonder.

How Do Kites Fly? The Magic of Wind!

Have you ever wondered how a simple piece of fabric or paper can soar so high in the sky? It's all thanks to the amazing power of wind! The wind is like an invisible hand pushing things all around us. When you hold your kite, you stand facing where the wind is coming from. The wind rushes against the front of the kite. This push creates a 'lift,' which is like the wind picking the kite up. The special shape of the kite is designed to catch the wind just right, helping it climb up. The string you hold is very important too! It keeps the kite from flying away completely. It also helps you guide the kite and make it dance and move in the sky. If there's no wind, a kite can't fly. So, a good windy day is a kite's very best friend! Did you know? Airplanes use some of the same clever ideas as kites to fly! They are much bigger and have powerful engines, but the way air lifts them up into the sky is very similar. Amazing, right?

Kite Festival Fun for Everyone!

A kite festival is not just about flying kites. It's a whole party and an exciting event! Imagine families having happy picnics on the beach. Children running around, laughing, and pointing at the sky with wide, excited eyes. Artists showing off their amazing handmade kites, some with incredible details. There are often special kite flying shows too! Some expert kite fliers can make their kites do amazing tricks. They can make them loop, dive, spin, and dance in ways you wouldn't believe. It's like watching a beautiful dance performance, but up in the sky! Sometimes, people even attach little things to their kites, like tiny flags, bells, or ribbons, to make them even more special and fun to watch. It’s a wonderful place where people can be creative and share their joy with others. Everyone leaves the festival feeling happy and inspired by the colourful sky. Did you know? Some kites are so strong and powerful, people have used them to pull small boats across water! But mostly, kites are just for fun and making the sky look incredibly beautiful and joyful.

Let's Dream of Kites!

So, next time you see the wind blowing outside, look up at the sky! Maybe you can imagine a sky full of thousands of colourful kites, just like in faraway Denmark. Perhaps you can even try to make your own simple kite from paper and string and let it dance in the breeze! It doesn't matter if your kite is big or small, simple or fancy. The most important thing is the joy of watching it fly and feeling the magic of the wind. Who knows, maybe one day you will see such an amazing kite festival in person! Keep dreaming big, my little friends, and keep reaching for the sky!
summary: Thousands of colourful kites filled the sky over Fano Island in Denmark at a big, happy festival, bringing joy to everyone who watched them dance with the wind.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows how people from all over the world can come together to share simple fun and make beautiful things, celebrating the joy of flying and friendship, even when they are far apart.

originalTitle: Man City close in on appointing Maresca as manager
title: A New Boss for the Big Blue Football Team!
content:
Hello, my super awesome friends in Africa! Do you love watching football? Do you love playing with a ball in the sunshine? Well, get ready for some exciting news from the big world of football! A very famous team, called Manchester City, is getting a new boss! This is super big news for all their fans, especially for kids who love to cheer for their favourite teams.

Meet the Big Blue Team!

Manchester City is a really, really cool football team. They wear bright blue shirts when they play, and they are known all over the world. They run very fast, kick the ball very hard, and try to score goals by putting the ball into a big net. Lots and lots of people love watching them play on TV and in big stadiums. Did you know? Football, or soccer as some call it, is the most popular sport in the whole wide world! Millions of kids, just like you, love to play it every single day. It’s so much fun to kick the ball and run with your friends. This team has many amazing players from different countries. Sometimes, even players from Africa get to play for super big teams like Manchester City! Isn't that wonderful? They make us all very proud.

Who Was Pep Guardiola?

Before this new news, Manchester City had a super famous leader. His name was Pep Guardiola. Can you say "Pep Gwa-r-dee-oh-la"? He was like the head teacher of the football team, or like a super clever coach! Pep helped the team win many, many shiny trophies. Trophies are like big, special prizes that teams get when they win competitions. He was a truly amazing coach! He taught the players how to work together like a happy family and how to play super football. Did you know? A good coach doesn't just teach you how to play, but also how to be a good friend and how to work as a team! They help everyone become better and have fun. Now, after many years of winning, Pep is going to take a rest and go on a new adventure. We thank him for all his amazing hard work and all the fun games he helped Manchester City play!

Say Hello to Enzo Maresca!

So, who is the new boss for the blue team? His name is Enzo Maresca! Can you say "En-zo Ma-res-ca"? It's a fun name to say! Enzo used to work with Pep Guardiola before. He was like Pep's main helper, his right-hand man! So, this means Enzo knows the team very, very well. He knows all their secrets to playing super awesome football! He knows how they like to pass the ball to each other. He knows how they like to run fast and kick the ball to score amazing goals. He knows what makes the team special. He will be the new manager, which means he will be in charge of everything on the football field. Did you know? Sometimes, a helper learns so much from their leader that they become a great leader themselves! It's like when you learn from your teacher and then you can help your younger friends.

What Does a Manager Do?

Being a football manager is a very, very important job. It's like being the captain of a big, fast ship, or the leader of a fun school trip! The manager decides which players will play in each game. They teach the players new moves, new tricks, and new ways to score goals. They tell the players where to run on the field and how to kick the ball just right. Most importantly, they make sure everyone on the team works together like a well-oiled machine. Imagine your teacher planning fun games for you and your friends; a manager plans fun games for their big football team! Did you know? Good teamwork is super important! It makes a team strong and helps them win, just like when you and your friends work together to build a big sandcastle! Managers also cheer up the players when they feel sad after losing a game. And they celebrate with the players with big smiles and high fives when they win! They are there for the team, always.

New Adventures for the Blue Team!

With Enzo Maresca as the new manager, it's a brand new beginning for Manchester City! It's like getting a new, exciting storybook to read, full of fresh adventures and surprises! Enzo will bring his own new ideas and new plans for the team. Maybe he will teach them super cool new ways to score goals! Maybe he will show them new ways to defend their goal and stop the other team from scoring! The players will learn exciting new things, and the fans will be super excited to watch what happens in the next football season. Everyone will be watching to see if Enzo can help the team win even more shiny trophies. Did you know? Change can be a good thing! It brings new energy, new ideas, and new fun to everything, even to football teams!

Football Fun in Africa!

We know that many, many kids in Africa absolutely love football! Maybe you play football with your friends every day after school? You kick a ball in the dusty fields or on the green grass, dreaming of being a famous player one day. Learning about new managers in big teams like Manchester City can be super inspiring. It shows that with hard work, learning, and dedication, anyone can become a leader, whether it's on a football team or in your community. Did you know? Many famous football players from Africa play in big teams all around the world! They make our continent very proud and show everyone how talented African players are! So, keep practicing your kicks, your passes, and your awesome goal celebrations! Who knows, maybe one day you'll be a famous football star, or even a super manager leading your own team!

Let's Cheer for Enzo!

So, let's give a big, loud cheer for Enzo Maresca! He has a big, exciting job to do. We wish him all the best luck and hope he helps Manchester City play amazing, wonderful football. We hope they score many, many incredible goals. And win many, many more shiny trophies! It's going to be a super exciting time for the blue team and all their fans around the world, including us here in Africa! Go, Enzo, go! Go, Manchester City, go! Let the new adventures begin!
summary: Manchester City, a famous blue football team, is getting a new boss named Enzo Maresca, who used to be a helper to their old super coach, Pep Guardiola.
whyMatters: This is important because a new boss brings fresh ideas and excitement, making football games even more thrilling for fans and showing that with hard work, anyone can become a leader like Enzo.
